does_not_claim: relation tuple interpretation preservation under AssignmentGaifmanClose

ledgered_invariants.name: equality_assignment_preservation_at_radius_zero
ledgered_invariants.statement: ∀ ρ τ : Fin n → M.carrier, AssignmentGaifmanClose M 0 ρ τ → ρ x = τ x ∧ ρ y = τ y

ledgered_invariants.name: relation_tuple_interpretation_preservation_at_radius_r
ledgered_invariants.statement: ∀ ρ τ : Fin n → M.carrier, AssignmentGaifmanClose M r ρ τ → (M.interp R (fun i => ρ (args i)) ↔ M.interp R (fun i => τ (args i)))

recursion_gate: Boolean or quantifier recursion is inadmissible until atomic preservation invariants are classified.
